mechanics.excerpt: Again he was halfway through the security system , delib erating over wire choices_ More certain of herself now; Jaime stepped right in and easily picked out the proper combinations that had t0 be cut and spliced_ The lock droned its sharp buzz , and Stephen shouldered his way through without waiting: Light spilled onto the ground from within and voices rose in question followed on heels turning immediately left to cover his back: Luckily for Stephen ran into guard who'd been using water cooler crowded behind the door we'd entered jabbed the barrel of my Intek rifle right into his chest over the heart; arrest- ing his move for the pistol riding beneath his left arm_ Two other Buards sat under the sights of Stephen' $ submachine gun; seated at table between set of stairs and another door; Tranq them; said, prodding this one hands into the air and then spinning him to face the wall: The first whispering cough sounded loud in the confines of the room; and risked glance back, thinking he had shot them with the silenced SMG_ He hadn"t, though it remained pressed into the side of one man' neck while he waited for the other t0 succumb to the tranquilizer.
